headline: Our Favorite Passive Income Idea Pays Big Dividends and Grows Daily
summary: Healthcare real estate investment trusts (REITs), which own properties such as senior housing, medical office buildings, skilled nursing facilities, and hospitals, may present a compelling opportunity right now. The demographic tailwind is hard to ignore: the U.S. baby boomer generation is aging rapidly, driving sustained demand for senior living and medical facilities that is not ...
